src: The Vanilla Calendar Pro is a versatile JavaScript date and time picker component with TypeScript support, making it compatible with any JavaScript frameworks and libraries. It is designed to be lightweight, easy to use, and feature-rich, without relying on external dependencies.
ja: Vanilla Calendar Proは、TypeScriptをサポートし、あらゆるJavaScriptフレームワークやライブラリと互換性のある多用途な日時ピッカーコンポーネントです。外部依存なしに、軽量で使いやすく、豊富な機能を提供します。
